continued_function_summary: Formal marketization and no-government-financing language coexists with continuing government receivables, finance-bureau receivables, delegated construction revenue, land rectification revenue, public utility operation, resettlement and infrastructure-related entities, and very large operating subsidies. The same issuer remains central to local public-development finance, so the case is coded as nominal exit.

issuer_name: 乐山国有资产投资运营(集团)有限公司
formal_event_summary: Prospectus disclosures state that the issuer was transferred out of the local government financing platform customer list by a 2011 Sichuan CBRC notice and was managed as a rectified general-company loan customer; later disclosures state that it does not undertake government financing functions after January 1 2015.
continued_function_summary: This is a direct formal transfer-out case, but the same issuer remains Leshan's most important infrastructure and state-asset management body and continues municipal infrastructure, affordable housing, transport infrastructure, land development, entrusted construction, government purchase service, PPP projects, government receivables, and subsidy-dependent operations. The formal exit therefore did not remove the issuer from public-development finance.

The formal exit therefore did not remove the issuer from public-development finance.
